notableEvents.label: Trevor Story GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story grounds into a double play, shortstop Trea Turner to second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper. Masataka Yoshida out at 2nd. Trevor Story out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Caleb Durbin GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Caleb Durbin grounds into a double play, second baseman Bryson Stott to shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Bryce Harper. Marcelo Mayer out at 2nd. Caleb Durbin out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Jarren Duran steals (9) 2nd base. Jarren Duran to 3rd. Jarren Duran advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher J.T. Realmuto.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Red Sox challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Isiah Kiner-Falefa steals (3) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Bryson Stott steals (8) 3rd base. Justin Crawford steals (4) 2nd base.
